strengths: A/B test design and analysis experience
weaknesses: Less product-titled role (Data Analyst vs Product Analyst)
No explicit stats modeling coursework beyond applied models
improvement_bullets: Developed automated tracking for customer journeys, utilizing GA4 and SQL to bridge raw event logs into actionable product analytics insights that reduced churn and improved feature adoption.
Integrated mobile app performance data with web analytics to perform deep-dive funnel analysis, driving a 15% increase in feature adoption through data-backed UI improvements.
Engineered complex SQL queries and Python-based data validation workflows to ensure high data quality for product analytics, supporting precise revenue and retention metric reporting.
Collaborated with cross-functional product pods to translate complex business questions into Amplitude-ready event tracking schemas, ensuring 100% instrumentation accuracy for new feature launches.
Analyzed user engagement and conversion funnels to inform product-led growth strategies, directly contributing to a 300% increase in high-value customer segment revenue.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Product Analyst opportunity with Avis Budget Group. I am interested in this opportunity because of the company's commitment to defining the future of mobility through data-driven, customer-focused innovation. What interests me about working for Avis Budget Group is its culture of performance and purpose, which aligns perfectly with my background in transforming raw data into high-impact business strategies. I believe my expertise in end-to-end data pipeline architecture and my proficiency in product-focused experimentation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by building 'single sources of truth' to align cross-functional teams. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed comprehensive Power BI and Looker workflows and automated sales reports that replaced manual processes, saving 8 hours per week and increasing reporting accuracy. By translating these complex technical findings into clear business recommendations, I helped stakeholders improve operational efficiency by 40% and grew targeted segment revenue by 300%. Ultimately, I know that the Product Analyst role at Avis Budget Group would allow me to bring my experience in A/B testing and statistical modeling to optimize the full digital customer journey. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data instrumentation and technical collaboration skills. By optimizing complex SQL queries and integrating API data into PostgreSQL warehouses, I improved testing data accuracy by 60% and successfully collaborated with 14-person product teams to align technical delivery with business objectives. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in SQL, Python, and statistical experimentation to support your web and mobile product pods. I know that my analytical rigor and communication skills align with what it takes to succeed at the Product Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
